Bash(git -C /Users/home/Documents/Code/Go_dev/go_claude commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Claude-based topic detector for conversation context management

Implements TopicDetector that uses Claude \(Haiku\) to identify and track
conversation topics. Includes topic shift detection by analyzing recent
messages and initial topic identification from message content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/home/Documents/Code/Go_dev/go_claude commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add topic archiver for intelligent context management

Implements Archiver component that handles topic archival and restoration
to/from SQLite cold storage. Key features:
- ArchiveTopic: Moves topic messages to archive, preserving full content
- RestoreTopic: Brings archived topics back to active context
- ArchiveUntilTarget: Archives lowest-relevance topics until usage drops to 50%
- GetArchivedTopics/GetArchiveHistory: Query archived content and history

Follows "archive, don 't compact" principle - full messages preserved verbatim.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
